summary: Iteration 31 - Market Maker Implementation Tests Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (15 in main run + 2 after rate limit cooldown). Frontend verified with all Market Maker UI elements working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Maker implementation fully tested and working. Backend tests cover: MM pricing (public), NENO exchange price/market with MM, quote buy (uses ask), quote sell (uses bid), treasury inventory (auth required), PnL report (auth required), risk dashboard, order book, buy NENO with MM (treasury decreases), sell NENO with MM (treasury increases), PnL ledger tracking, crypto off-ramp fallback (correctly fails with insufficient USDT), treasury asset breakdown, swap quote with MM, swap execution with MM. Frontend verified: MM Pricing Strip shows BID/ASK/SPREAD/SKEW/TREASURY/MODEL, Buy quote shows Ask price + Mid Price + Spread, Off-Ramp Crypto tab shows wallet input + USDT/USDC selector.
frontend_elements_verified: MM Pricing Strip: BID=9,815.16, ASK=9,984.82, SPREAD=169.7bps, SKEW=-1.65%, TREASURY=397.0, MODEL=Market Maker
Buy Tab: Quote shows Prezzo NENO (Ask) EUR 9,984.82, Mid Price EUR 9,999.99, Spread 169.7 bps (1.70%)
Off-Ramp Crypto: Wallet Destinazione (BSC) input field
Off-Ramp Crypto: Info message about receiving stablecoin on BSC
Off-Ramp Crypto: Quote shows Valore lordo (Bid), Fee, Spread, Ricevi

market_maker_features_verified.pricing_endpoint: GET /api/market-maker/pricing returns bid, ask, mid_price, spread_bps, inventory_skew, treasury_neno
market_maker_features_verified.treasury_endpoint: GET /api/market-maker/treasury returns assets with available/locked breakdown (auth required)
market_maker_features_verified.pnl_endpoint: GET /api/market-maker/pnl returns spread_revenue, fee_revenue, total_revenue, trade_count (auth required)
market_maker_features_verified.risk_endpoint: GET /api/market-maker/risk returns risk_level, neno_inventory, target_inventory, inventory_ratio (auth required)
market_maker_features_verified.quote_buy_integration: GET /api/neno-exchange/quote?direction=buy uses ask price, includes mm_bid/mm_ask/mm_spread_bps
market_maker_features_verified.buy_integration: POST /api/neno-exchange/buy uses ask price, updates treasury (NENO decreases), records PnL
market_maker_features_verified.sell_integration: POST /api/neno-exchange/sell uses bid price, updates treasury (NENO increases), records PnL
market_maker_features_verified.crypto_offramp_fallback: POST /api/neno-exchange/offramp with destination=crypto attempts stablecoin transfer (fails correctly with 0 USDT)
